news_log.title: USD/JPY Price Forecast: 20-day EMA acts as key support zone around 157.50
news_log.one_liner: USD strengthens as it finds support near 157.50, while JPY underperforms.

news_log.title: US Dollar gains momentum to near 99.50 amid Fed hawkish hold, Middle East tensio
news_log.one_liner: US Dollar strengthens amid Fed's hawkish stance and geopolitical tensions.

news_log.title: Analysis-Iran conflict could flip China’s deflation into ’bad inflation’
news_log.one_liner: Iran conflict may lead to inflationary pressures in China, strengthening the USD.

news_log.title: Goldman Sachs expects prolonged BoE pause, sees next rate cut in 2027
news_log.one_liner: Goldman Sachs' forecast of a prolonged BoE pause negatively impacts GBP while supporting USD.

news_log.title: Australian Dollar weakens as Australian Unemployment Rate rises, PBOC holds rate
news_log.one_liner: Rising unemployment in Australia weakens AUD, benefiting USD.

news_log.title: investingLive Americas market news wrap: Big market moves in oil, gold and FX
news_log.one_liner: Strong US jobs data boosts USD, pressures EUR.

news_log.title: WTO cuts global trade outlook, says Middle East conflict lifts energy risks
news_log.one_liner: WTO cuts trade outlook, boosting USD while pressuring EUR due to increased energy risks.

news_log.title: investingLive Asia-Pacific FX news wrap: Gold bounced back above $4730
news_log.one_liner: Gold's rebound supports USD, while GBP remains unaffected by BoE's stance.
